verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have found exceeding joy, Jesus answered when I called this Name that has saved me, pure love that embraced me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Mercy, grace, eternal life. Bought from darkness to His light. While lost in my sin, He raised me and made me live.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My soul magnifies the Lord, my heart joys in God my Saviour, for He lifts the lowly, He's done great things for me. I will sing, praising evermore, He is mighty and Holy is His Name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will lift my head up high, praising Jesus through each trial. Though I have not seen Him, I love Him completely.
